code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> PENDING: Initialize Node
    
    PENDING --> READY: Dependencies Complete
    PENDING --> SKIPPED: Dependency Failed
    
    READY --> RUNNING: Start Execution
    READY --> SKIPPED: Guard Blocked
    
    RUNNING --> COMPLETE: Success
    RUNNING --> FAILED: Error
    
    FAILED --> READY: Retry (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)
    
    COMPLETE --> [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker]: Terminal
    SKIPPED --> [IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic]: Terminal
    
    note right of PENDING
        Waiting for dependencies
        to complete
    end note
    
    note right of READY
        All dependencies satisfied,
        can be scheduled
    end note
    
    note right of RUNNING
        Currently executing
        node handler
    end note
    
    note right of COMPLETE
        Successfully completed
        with output
    end note
    
    note right of FAILED
        Execution failed
        with error
    end note
    
    note right of SKIPPED
        Bypassed due to failed
        dependencies or guards
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为工业物联网场景设计一个节点执行状态机。核心是MQTT Broker作为入口，节点生命周期从PENDING开始，经过READY、RUNNING，最终到达COMPLETE或FAILED。
明白。PENDING是等待依赖的状态对吧？那如果依赖失败或者guard条件不满足，节点应该能直接跳过？
对，SKIPPED是终态之一。另外FAILED之后要支持重试，重试时回到READY状态，这个需要PLC逻辑来控制。
好的，我先画出主流程：MQTT Broker初始化节点到PENDING，依赖完成后进入READY，启动执行后变为RUNNING，成功则到COMPLETE并结束。
每个状态加个注释说明吧。比如PENDING注明"Waiting for dependencies to complete"，READY写"All dependencies satisfied, can be scheduled"。
已添加。RUNNING的注释我写了"Currently executing node handler"，COMPLETE是"Successfully completed with output"，FAILED是"Execution failed with error"。
SKIPPED的终态指向需要确认一下——应该连到PLC Logic对吧？还有它的注释是"Bypassed due to failed dependencies or guards"。
确认无误。COMPLETE和SKIPPED都作为终态，分别回到MQTT Broker和PLC Logic。整个状态机覆盖了初始化、等待、执行、完成、失败、跳过、重试的完整生命周期。
